## 4. Experimental Design Summary

Draft full_validation plan for Synthetic potency method example. Scope rationale: Complete draft planning package for the stated method use. Required planning fields: intended purpose, sample matrix, reportable result, selected characteristics, experimental design, criteria rationale, system checks, deviation handling, human review statement. This design requires confirmation with method development data and human review. Missing information must be resolved before final use.

## 5. Deviation Handling

All deviations, invalid runs, repeats, and data exclusions require documentation, impact assessment, and analytical lead / QA review before final use.
